arts.ttl: Leicester City predicted line-up v Liverpool as Patson Daka starts amid three changes
arts.sum: Jakub Stolarczyk and Patson Daka could be handed their first starts of the season when Leicester City head to Premier League leaders Liverpool on Boxing Day. While Hermansen’s groin injury is improving, Ruud van Nistelrooy’s uncertainty means he may not be risked at Anfield.

arts.ttl: Arne Slot makes Cody Gakpo transfer claim as Liverpool boss prepares to face old rival
arts.sum: Arne Slot is looking forward to renewing his managerial rivalry with Ruud van Nistelrooy when Liverpool host Leicester City

arts.ttl: Virgil van Dijk loves Arne Slot's new rule at Liverpool after Jurgen Klopp change
arts.sum: Liverpool captain Virgil van Dijk has been in fine form once again this season and has been speaking about life at Anfield under new manager Arne Slot

arts.ttl: What channel is Liverpool vs Leicester on? How to watch Premier League match for free
arts.sum: There's the rare opportunity of being able to watch Premier League football for free on Boxing Day, with Liverpool taking on Leicester City in one of eight games

arts.ttl: Liverpool vs Leicester: Preview, predictions and lineups
arts.sum: Liverpool host Leicester in the Premier League on Boxing Day. Preview includes team news, predicted lineups, how to watch on TV and more.

arts.ttl: EXCLUSIVE - Virgil van Dijk gives honest opinion on new Arne Slot rule at Liverpool
arts.sum: The Liverpool defender has opened up about life under Arne Slot and one significant change in particular that the Dutch coach has brought in since joining the club

arts.ttl: Liverpool handed injury update ahead of Leicester City as Arne Slot explains Federico Chiesa absence
arts.sum: Arne Slot has offered an injury update ahead of Liverpool's Boxing Day clash with Leicester City

arts.ttl: I left Liverpool like Trent Alexander-Arnold could - this is what would await him
arts.sum: Nobody knows the consequences of leaving Liverpool better than Michael Owen, whose transfer to Real Madrid could be replicated by Trent Alexander-Arnold

arts.ttl: Mohamed Salah shouldn't copy my Liverpool exit decision – I left for a different reason
arts.sum: Mohamed Salah has already been told he has no reason not to sign a new Liverpool contract by fellow club legend Ian Rush, who explained why his situation was different

arts.ttl: Mohamed Salah contract latest as Liverpool close in on crucial phase of talks
arts.sum: Mohamed Salah's current Liverpool deal will run out at the end of the current season, and in theory he will be allowed to discuss terms with foreign clubs on New Year's day
